VAL-AUTOPILOT-037.validationMechanism: The assertion tests merge coordination preventing conflicting run completion. The fix (commit 87ac266c) wired product lock handlers into worker.ts. Unit tests verify: (1) acquire-product-lock creates locks, (2) conflicting locks are rejected with 'Cannot acquire lock', (3) check-merge-conflict returns hasConflict=true with reason, (4) release-product-lock clears locks. UI shows conflict badges in Delivery Runs when product locks exist.
